bodyText: You're back online We use cookies to measure performance and improve your experience. Privacy policy Manage cookies Skip to main content Doctor-issued certificate · Employer policies vary · Certificate ready: ~20 min (doctor review) Get your certificate stripe · · No Medicare needed Medical certificate. From your bed. No video. No call. No appointment. AHPRA-registered Australian doctors review every request. PDF in your inbox, ready to forward. Full refund if our doctor can't help. Issued by AHPRA-registered Australian doctors. Employer and institution policies may vary. Get your certificate · $19.95 Google Telehealth Certified + InstantMed ABN 64 694 559 334 Level 1, 457 Elizabeth St Surry Hills NSW 2010 MEDICAL CERTIFICATE DATE ISSUED 27 April 2026 I certify that JOHN SMITH consulted me. Based on my assessment, they were unable to attend their usual work duties. ABSENT Friday, 27 April 2026 (1 day) ISSUED BY AHPRA-registered doctor Registration on file AHPRA Fair Work Act s 107 REF IM-2026-48231 SPECIMEN Delivered to inbox PDF attachment, 1 page WORKPLACE DOCUMENTATION Doctor-issued certificate with verification built in. Issued by AHPRA-registered Australian doctors with standard sick-leave evidence details. WORKPLACE POLICY CONTEXT Common Australian workplace examples only. No employer relationship is implied. For Employers and HR Verify a Certificate Total turnaround Back on the couch in minutes. Not hours. INSTANTMED ~20min GP CLINIC 2+hrs 2 min form Doctor reviews your request Certificate in your inbox Call to book appointment Travel to clinic Waiting room and consult POPULAR SEARCHES Common certificate searches Useful routes for patients comparing same-day, work, carer, student, and local certificate options before starting a request. Same day medical certificate Short illness or carer leave requests reviewed online. Medical certificate for work Workplace evidence, absence dates, and privacy boundaries. Online sick certificate Doctor-reviewed sick certificate request pathway. One day certificate For a short absence where telehealth review is suitable. Two day certificate For a longer short absence, assessed by a doctor. Cold and flu certificate Common short-illness evidence with red-flag boundaries. See also:Mental health day certificate·Carer's leave certificate·Student medical certificate·Shift worker certificate·Sydney·Melbourne·Brisbane·Perth·Adelaide·Gold Coast How it works No appointment, no waiting room. Fill a form, a doctor reviews it, and your certificate lands in your inbox. 1 Fill a short health form Tell us about your symptoms and how long you have been unwell. Takes about 2 minutes. ~2 minutes 2 A real doctor reviews it An AHPRA-registered doctor reviews your assessment and decides whether a certificate is clinically appropriate. Doctor review 3 Certificate sent to you If approved, your medical certificate is emailed to you as a PDF with verification details. Digital delivery Get your certificate · $19.95 Before payment Clear fee. Clear fallback. Straightforward fees, no surprises. Here is exactly what your fee covers, and what happens if a doctor cannot help. What your fee covers The doctor review, certificate decision, secure PDF delivery, and verification details. No subscription. If the doctor needs more They can message you through the secure platform. In rare cases, a quick call may be needed. If online review is not suitable We refund the request and explain why, so you are not paying for a dead end. What we can help with We cover most common short-term conditions. For anything outside our scope, we'll tell you upfront. Common conditions we cover Cold, flu, and respiratory infections Gastroenteritis and stomach bugs Migraine and headaches Back pain and muscle strain Mental health days Period pain and menstrual symptoms General malaise and fatigue Carer’s leave (caring for a sick dependent) When to see a GP instead Workplace injuries requiring WorkCover documentation Conditions needing a physical examination Extended absences beyond 3–5 days Complex or ongoing chronic conditions Certificates for legal proceedings Medical emergencies - call 000 If your request isn't suitable, we'll refund your payment and explain why - no questions asked. Not sure if we can help? Ask us first or check our FAQ - we'll be straight with you. FAQ Before you start Everything you need to know about getting your certificate. How much does it cost? Will my employer accept this? Can I use this for uni or TAFE? What happens after I submit? Show all 15 questions View all questions The Fair Work Act 2009 (Cth), s 107 allows employers to request evidence for personal leave. Fair Work guidance says the evidence should satisfy a reasonable person. All InstantMed certificates are issued by AHPRA-registered practitioners. Back to bed in two minutes.
